roles.title: U.S. Talent Investor, Senior Associate
roles.description: Support founders throughout their journey from initial meeting to exit. Identify exceptional individuals before they're recognized as such, advise founders on forming teams and developing ideas, and facilitate fundraising in San Francisco during the LAUNCH phase.

roles.title: Paris Talent Investor, Senior Associate
roles.description: Talent Investor role based in Paris. Support founders in identifying cofounders, developing ideas, and connecting with investors and advisors. Interests include B2B, consumer, and deeptech.

roles.title: London Talent Investor, Analyst
roles.description: Entry-level Talent Investor role based in London. Work with founders on idea development, cofounding relationships, and investor connections. Background in philosophy, logic, or similar analytical fields valued.
